---
id: ptt-start

description: "Returns a session ID that must be passed to the stop endpoint."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Start a PTT recording session."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/stt/ptt/start"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns a session ID that must be passed to the stop endpoint.
If an active session exists, it is automatically cancelled.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
